commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `resolveTranscriptStemToSessionKeys` to skip empty or missing `sessionId` values during QMD slug fallback, adds regression coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +17, Docs +1. Total +19 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main reaches `normalizeQmdSessionStem(entry.sessionId)` during QMD slug fallback, and stored session entries can be metadata-only. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the source PR includes a direct after-fix resolver probe for the same mixed-store case.
commands.review_followup: No separate repair lane is needed because the automerge-opted replacement PR already contains the narrow fix, regression test, changelog entry, and sufficient proof.

target.title: fix: guard QMD session stem fallback
